title: Guardian flight
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Guardian flight''' was a unit of [[N-1 starfighter]]s in [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] spaceport of [[Kwilaan/Legends|Kwilaan]].

On [[31 BBY/Legends|31 BBY]], the leader of the flight was lieutenant [[Davonn]], who used two of his fighters to try and stop the ''[[Majestic Gundark]]''

==Appearances==
*{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/sw20010222part1|text=Operation: Clodhopper Part I: Rendezvous at Frundle's|int=Operation: Clodhopper}}
